channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis proposes checks-and-balances framework for frontier AI
item.description: The governance proposal won broad praise for being actionable and realistic.
item.content:encoded:
The governance proposal won broad praise for being actionable and realistic.

Original source: https://foreignaffairs.com/world/artificial-intelligence-power-paradox

  • Posts: 45

item.title: Sam Altman claims OpenAI has hit 5.6 sol growth
item.description: Altman warned users to expect minor service hiccups during scaling
item.content:encoded:
Altman warned users to expect minor service hiccups during scaling

Original source: https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-not-much-happened-today-c72

item.title: DeepMind's Demis Hassabis predicts AGI will arrive within a few years
item.description: He compares its impact to fire, warning of critical biosecurity risks.
item.content:encoded:
He compares its impact to fire, warning of critical biosecurity risks.

Original source: https://newsletter.rootsofprogress.org/p/the-unlimited-horizon-part-2

item.title: Anthropic's philosophical Claude video ad sparks debate on AI risk marketing
item.description: Critics argue using existential safety risks for promotion damages public trust.
item.content:encoded:
Critics argue using existential safety risks for promotion damages public trust.

item.title: Demis Hassabis proposes US-led FINRA-style frontier AI standards body
item.description: The voluntary framework would test advanced models for up to 30 days
item.content:encoded:
The voluntary framework would test advanced models for up to 30 days

item.title: WecoAI demonstrates first experimental recursive self-improvement in AI agent
item.description: The autonomous agent beat a human-designed benchmark after eight days.
item.content:encoded:
